candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; identical to Net sales and included in preferred candidates, suitable as top-line revenue.
Not revenue; this is COGS.

candidates.why: A cost subcomponent, not revenue.
COGS, not revenue.
Other income/non-operating, not core revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortisation in Sales and marketing expenses
candidates.why: Expense subcomponent, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue total from candidates.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and standard COGS label.
Also a valid COGS label, but appears duplicate of Cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortisation included in cost of sales
candidates.why: Only a subcomponent of COGS, not full COGS.
Balancing row; should be avoided when explicit COGS exists.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type operating overhead line, populated across years; per rules, select only this when available and populated.
Could be an SG&A component, but explicit SG&A row exists, so no need to add components.
Balance-sheet liability, not an income-statement expense row.
Depreciation/amortization component should be excluded from XSGA.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy rule (a).

candidates.why: Broad finance expense bucket; usable fallback if specific interest lines are unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most specific and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense line for lease liabilities; appropriate secondary fallback.
Net finance cost line; fallback only if no direct interest expense available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Hybrid Debt Instruments - Equity
candidates.why: Specific financing cost, but more akin preferred distributions/hybrid instrument cost than standard interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; less preferred than primary reported line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from liabilities at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific reported interest expense line first, then lease-interest line, then broader finance expense fallbacks. Excluded supplemental duplicate and hybrid equity instrument line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE when separate NCI exists.
Balancing row, not a proper equity measure.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Selected parent/owner equity to exclude non-controlling interests as required.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Income statement allocation line, not balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best fit for MIB.
Also a balance-sheet minority interest line, but values appear inconsistent versus Total equity; use as fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI line first; included alternate label as fallback since labels may change over time.
